title: Springshare Licenses
name: Springshare Licenses
statement_of_work: Justification and Approval For Other than Full and Open Competition Plan ID Number: 2026-LGO-0004 As a legislative branch agency, the Library is subject to the competition and advertising requirements of 41 U.S.C. § 6101.
deliverables: Contracting without competition shall not be justified on the basis of a lack of advance planning or concerns related to availability of funds
This form shall be used to support instances where competition will be limited to a single source, a limited number of sources, including where a brand name product is required
